hero.title: IT Engineer & GIS Specialist
hero.bio: IT engineer with GIS training, passionate about data analysis and environmental modeling, water resources and climate change.

about.title: IT Engineer & Data Analyst
about.p1: I'm RANDRIANANDRASANA Alain Johny, an IT engineer with specialized training in Geographic Information Systems (GIS). Passionate about data analysis and environmental modeling.
about.p2: Skilled in Python, databases and data processing, I am motivated to contribute to research related to water resources and climate change.

title: My
Services
descs: Processing and analysis of environmental data with Python, pandas and NumPy.
Geographic Information Systems, mapping and applied geomatics.
Statistical and predictive modeling for environment and climate.
Studies and analyses related to water resource management.
Research and modeling of climate change impacts.
